'''The Krayt Dragon Lounge''' was a bar in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] visited this bar the day before they met [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi]] in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. There they encountered [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], and later [[Kabe/Legends|Kabe]]. Outside the bar they came across [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], who delivered the news of [[Bria Tharen]]'s death.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
